steps.title: Target the requested difference
steps.content: The student wants a contrast between baking soda and baking powder. The notes show that baking soda needs liquid plus an acidic ingredient to produce carbon dioxide, while baking powder needs liquid but not a separate acidic ingredient.

steps.title: Eliminate noncontrasts
steps.content: A and B describe similarities between the two leavening agents. C identifies baking soda and honey but does not compare baking soda with baking powder. The effective sentence uses the acid requirement to contrast the two. The answer is D.
